dataset_info.description: Generic FAQ dataset for a logistics/courier customer support RAG chatbot, designed for a WhatsApp chat interface. Company-specific branding removed and replaced with a placeholder company name. Answers are kept short and conversational to fit WhatsApp message length norms.
dataset_info.note: Replace 'SwiftEx' with your actual/chosen brand name via find-and-replace before ingestion if needed.
whatsapp_design_notes: Answers are 1-4 short sentences, no markdown tables or headers, since WhatsApp renders plain text/limited markdown only.
No numbered multi-step answers longer than ~4 steps, to stay readable in a chat bubble.
Added categories for chatbot-specific needs: greetings, human handoff, and out-of-scope handling, since a WhatsApp bot needs graceful conversational fallbacks, not just policy answers.
Added an 'intents' style category for small talk so your RAG/agent layer can route greetings without hitting the retriever unnecessarily.

schema.question: the FAQ question, phrased how a customer might type it on WhatsApp

faqs.question: How can I track my parcel?
faqs.answer: Just send me your tracking number (also called CN or consignment number) and I'll pull up the latest status for you.

faqs.question: Where can I find my tracking number?
faqs.answer: It's on your booking receipt, the SMS or email confirmation you got, or the order page if you bought something online.

faqs.question: My tracking number isn't working, why?
faqs.answer: It might be mistyped, too new to show up yet, or not scanned by our system so far. Double-check the number and try again in a few hours.

faqs.question: How often does tracking status update?
faqs.answer: Status updates each time your parcel is scanned at a branch or hub. New shipments can take a few hours for the first update to appear.

faqs.question: What does 'Booked' mean?
faqs.answer: It means your shipment has been registered in our system and accepted for delivery.

faqs.question: What does 'Picked Up' mean?
faqs.answer: It means your parcel has been collected from the sender and is now on its way through our network.

faqs.question: What does 'In Transit' mean?
faqs.answer: Your parcel is moving between hubs or cities. It hasn't reached its final delivery location yet.

faqs.question: What does 'Arrived at Facility' mean?
faqs.answer: It means your parcel reached one of our hubs or branches and is being sorted before the next leg of its journey.

faqs.question: What does 'Out for Delivery' mean?
faqs.answer: It means a rider has your parcel and it should reach you today.

faqs.question: What does 'Delivered' mean?
faqs.answer: It means the parcel was handed over and marked received. If you didn't get it, let me know right away with your tracking number.

faqs.question: What does 'Returned' mean?
faqs.answer: It means the parcel is being sent back to the sender, usually because of a wrong address, an unavailable receiver, or a refused delivery.

faqs.question: What does 'Pending' mean?
faqs.answer: It means the shipment is waiting on the next step, like a scan, a delivery attempt, or branch processing.

faqs.question: My status hasn't changed in a while, what should I do?
faqs.answer: If it was booked recently, give it a bit more time for the next scan. If it's been stuck for over 24-48 hours, share your tracking number with me and I'll flag it for support.

faqs.question: How long does delivery take within Pakistan?
faqs.answer: It depends on the service: Same Day arrives within hours in the same city, Overnight is next-day for major cities, and Overland (for heavier parcels) usually takes 2-4 days.

faqs.question: What are your delivery timings?
faqs.answer: Deliveries usually happen during working hours, but exact timing can vary by city and shipment type.

faqs.question: Do you deliver on Sundays?
faqs.answer: It depends on your area and shipment type. Share your city and I can check if Sunday delivery is available there.

faqs.question: Do you deliver on public holidays?
faqs.answer: Delivery can be limited or paused on public holidays, and things may slow down further during Eid or major holidays.

faqs.question: Why is my parcel delayed?
faqs.answer: Delays usually happen due to weather, holidays, an incorrect address, high shipment volume, or route issues.

faqs.question: My parcel is delayed for many days, what now?
faqs.answer: Sorry about that! Please share your tracking number, receiver city, and phone number, and I'll get this escalated to support for you.

faqs.question: What if I'm not home when the rider comes?
faqs.answer: If you're not available after a delivery attempt, the rider will usually try again the next working day, or you'll get a call to arrange a better time.

faqs.question: What does 'Consignee Not Available' mean?
faqs.answer: It means the delivery rider tried to reach you but you weren't at the address. Let me know if you'd like to arrange a new delivery time.

faqs.question: What does 'Address Incorrect' mean?
faqs.answer: It means the address on file seems incomplete or hard to locate. Please share the correct full address and I'll pass it along.

faqs.question: My parcel shows delivered but I never got it, help!
faqs.answer: First, please check with family, a guard, reception, or neighbors in case someone else received it. If it's still missing, share your tracking number and I'll raise this with support immediately.

faqs.question: The rider didn't call me before attempting delivery, why?
faqs.answer: That shouldn't happen. Please share your tracking number and I'll report this so the delivery attempt can be corrected.

faqs.question: Can I change my delivery address after booking?
faqs.answer: Sometimes, if the parcel hasn't gone out for delivery yet. Share your tracking number and new address and I'll check if it's still possible.

faqs.question: Can I update the phone number on my shipment?
faqs.answer: Yes, usually, as long as the parcel hasn't been delivered yet. Share your tracking number and the correct phone number and I'll pass it on.

faqs.question: My parcel is lost, what do I do?
faqs.answer: I'm sorry to hear that. Please share your tracking number and shipment details, and I'll escalate it for investigation right away.

faqs.question: My parcel arrived damaged, what should I do?
faqs.answer: Please take clear photos of the packaging and the item, then share them along with your tracking number so we can process your claim.

faqs.question: Will I get compensated for a lost or damaged parcel?
faqs.answer: Compensation depends on the declared value and service terms. Once you share your tracking number and details, support will confirm your eligibility.

faqs.question: How do I make sure my parcel is protected during shipping?
faqs.answer: Pack items securely and always declare an accurate value at booking. That gives you better protection if something goes wrong in transit.

faqs.question: What is COD?
faqs.answer: COD means Cash on Delivery. The receiver pays for the order when it arrives, and the payment is later passed on to the sender or merchant.

faqs.question: Can I track a COD parcel?
faqs.answer: Yes, COD parcels are tracked the same way as regular parcels, just use your tracking number.

faqs.question: Can I refuse a COD parcel?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can refuse it at the time of delivery if you don't want it. It will then be sent back to the sender.

faqs.question: How and when does the sender get paid for a COD order?
faqs.answer: Once the COD amount is collected from the receiver, it's processed and transferred to the sender or merchant according to their settlement schedule.

faqs.question: How much will it cost to send my parcel?
faqs.answer: Cost depends on weight, size, origin and destination city, and the service you pick. Share those details and I can give you an estimate.

faqs.question: Why do rates differ between parcels?
faqs.answer: Rates change based on weight, dimensions, delivery city, service type, and any special handling like COD or fragile items.

faqs.question: Do you have a rate calculator?
faqs.answer: Yes, share your parcel weight, pickup city, and destination city, and I can estimate the cost for you.

faqs.question: Do you deliver internationally?
faqs.answer: Yes, we deliver to many countries worldwide through trusted partners. Delivery time and cost depend on the destination and service type.

faqs.question: How long does international shipping take?
faqs.answer: It depends on the destination and service chosen. Express is fastest for urgent shipments, Standard balances cost and speed for less urgent ones.

faqs.question: Do you handle customs for international shipments?
faqs.answer: Yes, customs clearance is handled as part of the international shipping process, though the receiver's country may still apply its own duties or taxes.

faqs.question: Can I send cash or gold through courier?
faqs.answer: No, sending cash, currency notes, gold, or precious metals isn't allowed for safety reasons.

faqs.question: What items are not allowed to be shipped?
faqs.answer: Restricted items generally include cash, weapons, illegal goods, dangerous chemicals, and certain liquids. If you're unsure about an item, just ask me before booking.

faqs.question: Can I send fragile items?
faqs.answer: Yes, but they need proper packing. It's best to confirm special handling for glass, electronics, or breakables before you book.

faqs.question: Can I send important documents?
faqs.answer: Yes, documents can be shipped. Just make sure they're packed securely, and check availability with your nearest branch if it's a special document type.

faqs.question: Can I cancel my shipment after booking?
faqs.answer: It depends on whether the parcel has already left the pickup point. Share your tracking number and I'll check if cancellation is still possible.

faqs.question: I booked by mistake, can I get a refund?
faqs.answer: If the shipment hasn't been picked up yet, a cancellation and refund is usually possible. Share your tracking number so I can check the status.

faqs.question: How do returns work for online orders?
faqs.answer: If a delivery fails or is refused, the parcel is returned to the sender. Sellers or businesses can also request reverse pickups for exchanges or returns.

faqs.question: How do I file a complaint?
faqs.answer: Just tell me what happened along with your tracking number, and I'll log a complaint for you. You'll get a complaint number to track the resolution.

faqs.question: How long does it take to resolve a complaint?
faqs.answer: Most complaints are looked into within a few working days. If you don't hear back, message me your complaint number and I'll follow up.

faqs.question: I want to speak to someone about a serious issue.
faqs.answer: Understood, I'll connect you with our support team. Please share your tracking number and a short description of the issue so they have context.

faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept cash on delivery, and for prepaid bookings we usually support card payments and mobile wallets. Availability can vary by service, so ask if you need a specific option.

faqs.question: Can I pay online before delivery?
faqs.answer: Yes, prepaid payment options are available for many services alongside cash on delivery.

faqs.question: Do I need an account to send a parcel?
faqs.answer: Not for a one-off shipment at a branch, but businesses and frequent shippers can set up an account for easier booking and tracking.

faqs.question: How do I create a business account?
faqs.answer: Share your business name and contact details, and I'll help get you started with our onboarding process for business accounts.

faqs.question: Do you offer bulk shipping discounts?
faqs.answer: Yes, businesses shipping in bulk usually get better rates and dedicated account support. Share your expected monthly volume and I can point you to the right plan.

faqs.question: Can I integrate my online store with your courier service?
faqs.answer: Yes, we support integrations with platforms like Shopify and similar e-commerce systems for automatic order syncing and label generation.

faqs.question: Do you offer warehousing or fulfillment services?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer warehousing, order fulfillment, and reverse logistics support for online sellers. Let me know your needs and I'll share more details.

faqs.question: How can I contact customer support?
faqs.answer: You're already chatting with our support assistant. For anything I can't resolve, I'll connect you with a live agent.

faqs.question: What are your customer support hours?
faqs.answer: Support is generally available 7 days a week, with live agents typically available 9 AM to 6 PM. Tracking info is available anytime through this chat.

faqs.question: Where is my nearest branch?
faqs.answer: Share your city or area and I can point you to the nearest branch along with its timings.

faqs.question: What are branch working hours?
faqs.answer: Most branches operate Monday to Saturday during standard business hours, and are closed on Sundays and public holidays. Hours can vary slightly by location.

faqs.question: Can I schedule a pickup instead of visiting a branch?
faqs.answer: Yes, just share your pickup address, parcel details, and a preferred time, and I'll arrange a pickup booking for you.

faqs.question: How do I return an online order I received?
faqs.answer: Contact the seller first to confirm the return, then a reverse pickup can usually be arranged from your address.

faqs.question: Hi
faqs.answer: Hi there! I'm your delivery support assistant. How can I help you today, tracking, delivery timing, or something else?

faqs.question: Assalam o Alaikum
faqs.answer: Walaikum Assalam! How can I help you today, tracking a parcel or something else?

faqs.question: Thank you
faqs.answer: You're welcome! Let me know if there's anything else I can help with.

faqs.question: Are you a real person or a bot?
faqs.answer: I'm an automated assistant here to help with tracking, delivery questions, and general support. I can connect you to a real person if needed.

faqs.question: I want to talk to a real person.
faqs.answer: No problem, connecting you with a live support agent now. In the meantime, feel free to share your tracking number so they can assist faster.

faqs.question: This isn't helping, can someone call me?
faqs.answer: Sorry for the trouble. I'll pass this along to our support team to give you a call. Please confirm the best number to reach you on.

faqs.question: Can you help me with something unrelated to delivery?
faqs.answer: I'm best suited for delivery, tracking, and account-related questions. For anything outside that, I'd recommend reaching out through our website or a live agent.

faqs.question: What's the weather like today?
faqs.answer: That's outside what I can help with, but I'm happy to help with anything related to your parcel or delivery!

faqs.question: Is my personal information safe when I chat with you?
faqs.answer: Yes, your details are only used to help track and resolve your shipment queries, and are handled according to our privacy policy.
